## Why It Works

It works because it pushes people out of their comfort zone by insinuating that people should try becoming entrepreneurs. Then it shares a realistic worst outcome, which makes the leap seem a lot safer. In the 'worst outcome', humorous references to bad company culture are used.

## Template

Try [Thing] this year.
Even if it's just a [SmallerVersion].
The worst outcome?
[HumorousStatementAboutPreviousThing].
Go for it in [Year].
